ref: Some people brought their children to Jesus, so he could place his hands on them and pray for them. His disciples told the people to stop bothering him.
text: Mawɛ̃ ɔkɔ mabiɛtɛ mabɔ Yesu sɔ ɔsia ma kɔrɔ̃ iso si ɔkparama kayi ɔtã ma, ɣɛɛ ɔ̃ marasuãdze ɔnyagalagu mmamɔ.
translated: He who was crucified by Jesus saw the world also to prepare food for them, and the resurrection of his body.

ref: When Jesus heard this, he was so surprised that he turned and said to the crowd following him, “I tell you in all of Israel I've never found anyone with this much faith!
text: Gɔ Yesu ɔnɔ atɔ̃me wagbe ne, ibara wũ ɣaa, ne ɔɣere mma nsiai wũ sɔ, “I ɔnukuare ame ne, loinya kafɔkaɖe siare gagbe igbã lonya i Israel karɔ̃ ɔɖuɖu iso.
translated: And Jesus, being in Galilee, spoke to them, saying, "I have not come to abolish the Law and the Prophets, but to fulfill them. For truly I tell you, until heaven and earth pass away, not an iota, not a dot, will pass from the Law until all is accomplished."

ref: A woman who had been bleeding for twelve years came up behind Jesus and barely touched his clothes.
text: Gɔ Yesu to ɔkɛlɛ ne, ɔrɔ̃go ɔwɛ̃ gɔ i ara to afere akɔ aweo-anyɔ ɔki i Yesu kama isɛ ɔpɛgu ɔ̃ awu kutsueti.
translated: When Jesus called him, he came to his side and said to Jesus, "You are the one who was crucified on the cross."

ref: So I will call you Peter, which means “a rock.” On this rock I will build my church, and death itself will not have any power over it.
text: Ne ɔso nto loɣere-ɔ sɔ fɔ nɖe Petro, gɔ karɔ̃ nɖe ita siare, fiɛ ita siare nɛgbe iso loatsue wũ mafɔɖedze ikuri losia gɔ kukpi kɔra iibawo ma iso ɔɖe.
translated: And he went to the house of Peter and found them praying, and he said to them, "Do not lose heart, for the scripture says that the child will be saved through prayer."

ref: I am sending you like lambs into a pack of wolves. So be as wise as snakes and as innocent as doves.
text: “Minyɔ! Nto lopia mi lɛ masɛrɛrerɔ̃ i magidi ndɛ̃. Ne ɔso mikpa anɔ lɛ maɣɛ, ɣɛɛ miɣɔ lɛ alɔpɔ.
translated: Hello! This work you are doing in the market. And they also bought the item when you go home.
